prompt.hintText: 追猎雪狼需要先选择并摧毁一名你控制的鸟类、猫科、犬形或魄罗属性战场单位。

P2.reason: 当前玩家普通开环行动

champion.name: Darius
champion.text: Whenever you play your second card in a turn, I get +2 might this turn and become ready.
champion.textZh: 每当你在回合中打出第二张牌时，让我本回合内{{S}}+2，并让我变为活跃状态。

handDetail.name: Arena Crowd Favorite
handDetail.text: Hunt. Spend 2 experience: give me BUFF.
handDetail.textZh:
{{狩猎}}（当我征服或据守一处战场时，获得1点经验值。）
消耗2经验：给予我{{增益}}。（如果我未拥有增益，则获得一个{{S}}+1增益。）

handDetail.name: Arena Crowd Favorite
handDetail.text: Hunt. Spend 2 experience: give me BUFF.
handDetail.textZh:
{{狩猎}}（当我征服或据守一处战场时，获得1点经验值。）
消耗2经验：给予我{{增益}}。（如果我未拥有增益，则获得一个{{S}}+1增益。）

keywordDescriptions.AMBUSH: AMBUSH: May be played to a lane with a friendly unit; gains reaction this way.

keywordDescriptionsZh.AMBUSH: 伏击：可打出到有己方单位的战场；以此方式打出时获得反应。

handDetail.name: Grim Apothecary
handDetail.text: Ambush. When you play me, you may return a friendly battlefield unit to its owner's hand.
handDetail.textZh:
{{伏击}}（你可以选择将我作为{{反应}}牌，打出到有己方单位的战场。）
当你打出我时，你可以选择让一名战场上的友方单位返回其所属的手牌。

keywordDescriptions.AMBUSH: AMBUSH: May be played to a lane with a friendly unit; gains reaction this way.

keywordDescriptionsZh.AMBUSH: 伏击：可打出到有己方单位的战场；以此方式打出时获得反应。

handDetail.name: Bromein Lord
handDetail.text: Ambush. When you play me, other units you have here gain Assault this turn.
handDetail.textZh:
{{伏击}}（你可以选择将我作为{{反应}}牌，打出到有己方单位的战场。）
当你打出我时，让你此处的其他单位本回合内获得{{强攻}}。（如果他们是进攻方，则{{S}}+1。）

legend.name: Voidreaver
legend.text: When you win a battle, gain 1 experience. Spend 1 experience, exhaust: give a unit BUFF. Spend 2 experience, exhaust: move a friendly exhausted unit on a battlefield to its base.
legend.textZh:
当你赢得一场战斗时，获得1经验。
消耗1经验，{{横置}}：给予一名单位{{增益}}。
消耗2经验，{{横置}}：将战场上一名处于休眠状态的友方单位移动到其基地。

champion.name: Darius
champion.text: Whenever you play your second card in a turn, I get +2 might this turn and become ready.
champion.textZh: 每当你在回合中打出第二张牌时，让我本回合内{{S}}+2，并让我变为活跃状态。

legend.name: Voidreaver
legend.text: When you win a battle, gain 1 experience. Spend 1 experience, exhaust: give a unit BUFF. Spend 2 experience, exhaust: move a friendly exhausted unit on a battlefield to its base.
legend.textZh:
当你赢得一场战斗时，获得1经验。
消耗1经验，{{横置}}：给予一名单位{{增益}}。
消耗2经验，{{横置}}：将战场上一名处于休眠状态的友方单位移动到其基地。

champion.name: Darius
champion.text: Whenever you play your second card in a turn, I get +2 might this turn and become ready.
champion.textZh: 每当你在回合中打出第二张牌时，让我本回合内{{S}}+2，并让我变为活跃状态。

legend.name: Voidreaver
legend.text: When you win a battle, gain 1 experience. Spend 1 experience, exhaust: give a unit BUFF. Spend 2 experience, exhaust: move a friendly exhausted unit on a battlefield to its base.
legend.textZh:
当你赢得一场战斗时，获得1经验。
消耗1经验，{{横置}}：给予一名单位{{增益}}。
消耗2经验，{{横置}}：将战场上一名处于休眠状态的友方单位移动到其基地。

champion.name: Darius
champion.text: Whenever you play your second card in a turn, I get +2 might this turn and become ready.
champion.textZh: 每当你在回合中打出第二张牌时，让我本回合内{{S}}+2，并让我变为活跃状态。

keywordDescriptions.AMBUSH: AMBUSH: May be played to a lane with a friendly unit; gains reaction this way.

keywordDescriptionsZh.AMBUSH: 伏击：可打出到有己方单位的战场；以此方式打出时获得反应。

handDetail.name: Stalking Snow Wolf
handDetail.text: Ambush. You must destroy a Bird, Cat, Dog, or Poro unit you control as an additional cost to play me. You may play me to that unit's lane, even if you have no other units there.
handDetail.textZh:
{{伏击}}（你可以选择将我作为{{反应}}牌，打出到有己方单位的战场。）
你必须摧毁一名自己控制的“鸟类”、“猫科”、“犬形”或“魄罗”属性单位，作为打出我的额外费用。你可以选择将我打出至该单位所在的战场（即使你在该处没有其他单位）。

keywordDescriptions.AMBUSH: AMBUSH: May be played to a lane with a friendly unit; gains reaction this way.
keywordDescriptions.TANK: TANK: Must take lethal damage before other targets can be damaged.

keywordDescriptionsZh.AMBUSH: 伏击：可打出到有己方单位的战场；以此方式打出时获得反应。
keywordDescriptionsZh.TANK: 壁垒：必须先对我分配致命伤害后才能伤及其他目标。

handDetail.name: Poppy, Helping Hand
handDetail.text: You may spend 3 experience as an additional cost to play me to reduce my cost by 3. Ambush. Tank.
handDetail.textZh:
你可以选择消耗3经验，作为打出我的额外费用，以此让我的费用减少{{3}}。
{{伏击}}（你可以选择将我作为{{反应}}牌，打出到有己方单位的战场。）
{{壁垒}}（我在战斗中首先承担伤害。）

keywordDescriptions.AMBUSH: AMBUSH: May be played to a lane with a friendly unit; gains reaction this way.

keywordDescriptionsZh.AMBUSH: 伏击：可打出到有己方单位的战场；以此方式打出时获得反应。

rulesEvidence.note: 下一回合开始会召出符文、抽牌，并在抽牌阶段清空符文池。
主阶段是普通开环；玩家没有要执行的自决行动时必须表明将结束本回合。
回合结束阶段包含结束步骤、失效步骤、回合结束特殊清理、清空符文池和推进回合队列。
清理期间不结算合法项目，且会重复执行直到状态稳定。
抽牌是限定行动；开始阶段抽牌步骤会指示回合玩家抽一张牌。
FAQ 澄清清理和特殊清理的时点、额外步骤与重复清理规则。
破限 FAQ 有额外回合相关个案，但未改变裸 END_TURN 的通用流程。
